plain_english_reason: This candidate-job pair scored highly mainly because of 'skill_match' (the single most influential feature learned by the model, importance=0.441), combined with the other logged features. It was shown at position 5 by model mv-2026.07.01, and that exact model identity was stamped on the impression event so this explanation stays valid even if the model is retrained tomorrow.
what_happens_if_model_is_unavailable: Serving falls back to the heuristic_fallback_ranker (see eval/failure_injection_test.py) instead of failing to serve a list. The fallback's identity is logged truthfully (model_name='heuristic_fallback_ranker'), so this worked example's explanation would never be silently attributed to a fallback decision, or vice versa.
